Localization.Description: Attempts to log in to a DBMS under different user accounts from the same host are detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Successful attempts to log in to a DBMS on host {event_src.host} from host {src.host} under different user accounts are detected
Failed attempts to log in to a DBMS on host {event_src.host} from host {src.host} under different user accounts are detected
